subject: [RFC PATCH v4 25/27] cxl/core: Add private node support to cxl_sysram

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: No comments have been made on this thread so far.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series extends the cxl_sysram region to support private node hotplug via add_private_memory_driver_managed(). When a caller passes private=true to devm_cxl_add_sysram(), the memory is registered as a private node, isolating it from normal allocations and reclaim. This change allows for more flexible memory management in certain scenarios.
